mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock( location, product_name, quantity, unit, production_date, shelf_life, last_in_time ) VALUES( #{location}, #{productName}, #{quantity}, #{unit}, #{productionDate}, #{shelfLife}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE quantity = quantity + VALUES(quantity), last_in_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE stock SET quantity = quantity + #{quantity}, last_in_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE stock SET quantity = quantity - #{quantity}, last_out_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM stock WHERE id IN
#{id}
